economic_notes: Caldwell Settlement Trust established with $75M Government of Canada contribution; trust net assets $86.2M as of Dec 31 2019. First Nation owns farmland, solar equipment, hunting and fishing facility. Cost of living assistance paid to members annually ($1,771,667 in 2020). COVID-19 pandemic declared March 11, 2020 with uncertain financial impacts noted.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Two wholly-owned subsidiaries consolidated: CFN Holdings Limited Partnership and Caldwell First Nation Holdings GP Inc. Three GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: The Happy Snapper Inc., Turtle Landing Inc., and 1887090 Ontario Limited. Caldwell Settlement Trust (with ~$86M net assets) is an economic interest only and NOT consolidated. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($496,935) + AIAI ($402,526) + Ministry of Children ($311,526) + Health Canada ($248,549) + Parks Canada ($18,601) + MCFS ($2,521) + Employment/training ($173,418) + OFNLP ($551,109) = note OFNLP included as government transfer given it is a First Nations-controlled entity distributing government funds; osr calculated accordingly. Long-term investments liquidated during year (proceeds $4,159,941). Major TCA acquisition of $4,198,021 primarily land. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
